hero.subtitle: Artys is the first platform where listening to music can earn you money, connect you to your favorite artists, and change their careers.

echo.subtitle: ECHO is your AI music assistant built into Artys. Tell it your mood, activity, genre — it creates your playlist in seconds. And every listen directly pays your artists.
echo.try_sub: Tell it what you want to listen to. It composes your playlist and includes artists from your Guild.
echo.footer_note: Every listen on Artys directly pays the artists 🌱

problem.title: You listen.
problem.p1: Every week, you spend hours listening to music. Spotify makes billions. The independent artist you love gets less than a cent.
problem.p2: And now, AI floods platforms with millions of generated tracks every day — mechanically diluting your artists' revenue.
problem.ia_title: ⚡ AI is making it worse in 2025
problem.ia_2: Spotify deleted 75 million spam tracks in one year
problem.ia_3: Deezer reports 50,000 AI uploads per day
problem.ia_4: Each artist's revenue share dilutes mechanically
problem.card1_title: What the artist earns per stream
problem.card1_desc: Less than a cent. Even if you play their full album every day.
problem.card2_desc: The vast majority of creators you love cannot live from their music.
problem.card3_title: The global catalog doubles in 3 years
problem.card3_desc: With generative AI, your artists' revenue halves — even as you keep listening.

backstage.title: Go truly
backstage.subtitle: As a Guild member, you're no longer just a listener. You're an active player in your artist's career.
backstage.ordinary_1: You listen → you don't exist to the artist
backstage.ordinary_2: You like → the algorithm takes the data
backstage.guild_1: Access to demos, private lives, behind-the-scenes
backstage.guild_4: Co-produce projects and receive a share of revenue

referral.title: Your subscription can be
referral.subtitle: Invite your friends. Earn Royaltips. Pass 10 referrals — your subscription is reimbursed.
referral.reassurance: Your referrals don't reduce artist revenue by a single cent. Artys funds this from its own margin.

fair.artys_value: Your subscription = the equivalent of 1,000 streams every month
fair.pillar1_desc: Your listens go directly to your artists — not into an opaque pool.
fair.pillar2_desc: You see exactly where every cent of your subscription goes.
fair.pillar3_desc: You can vote on ecosystem rules via The Ark of Culture.

social.title: This isn't streaming. It's a
social.story_text: Sarah joined Lucas's Guild 6 months ago. She shared his EP, invited 3 friends, voted on his artwork. This month, she earned €15 in Royaltips. Lucas funded his next video clip thanks to his Guild.
social.quote: This isn't streaming. It's a relationship.

governance.title: Become a
governance.p1: Artys has delegated the governance of its ecosystem to The Ark of Culture — an independent federation bringing together artists, professionals and fans.
governance.p2: By joining the federation, you vote on ecosystem decisions, access exclusive services and help build a fair music industry.

cta_section.subtitle: Be among the first fans to access Backstages of your favorite artists. Listen, support, earn.
cta_section.note_text: Join thousands of fans preparing for June 2026
cta_section.field_artist_label: Which artist would you like to support first?
cta_section.field_artist_hint: Paste the artist's Instagram or TikTok profile — known or independent, doesn't matter!
cta_section.form_success_body: We'll reach out before everyone else at launch. See you soon in the Artys ecosystem ✦
cta_section.form_consent: By signing up, you agree to receive Artys news. Zero spam, unsubscribe in 1 click.

footer.tagline: The first fair streaming platform where artists and fans co-create and co-earn — governed by its members.
